---
id: rule-sync-branch-is-sync-never-main-1
type: rule
created: 2026-07-02T09:00:00Z
title: Sync branch is sync never main
tags: [git, sync]
links: [decision-sqlite-rejected-for-storage-1]
---
Always push the memory store to the sync branch. Pushing to main is
forbidden; main is for code review only.
